title: Stage1 preferred term entity
description: Draft v1.4.0-gated OODS registry entity for promoted disambiguation/canonical-term decisions. Additive stub only.

id.description: Stable registry identifier for the promoted term entity.

aliases.description: Alternate labels that collapse into the canonical term.

scope.description: Target-scoped during incubation, registry-scoped once promoted.

domain.description: Optional domain or namespace for the term.

source_decision_ids.description: Decision ids that promoted this term into the registry.

metadata.description: Open metadata bag reserved for future registry-side term semantics.
